category.name: zoo.event.circus
category.item: Welcome to the traveling circus! Introducing the Mystery Box! Buy one box and get one of 10 animals. You can have up to 20 boxes at a time, and each box can be opened in up to 5 hours. Have fun!
The following animals have been added to your inventory: %animal%. Get even more mysterious crates to get even more unique animals!
You already have 20 mysterious chests. Wait until one of them opens and then get another chest.
The mystery box will open for: %amount%
While you were away, your animals got thirsty from the mysterious crate. Breeder Sonia took care of them and brought them to her inventory. Take a quick look!
